headline: Election Commission redrew 14 constituencies without public hearing
context: The Election Commission completed constituency redelineation in 14 federal seats in Johor and Pahang in February 2026 without holding the mandatory public objection sessions.

cards.big: 14 constituency boundaries redrawn — affected voters were never consulted
cards.sub: EC skipped mandatory public hearings in Johor and Pahang redelineation exercise

cards.big: Federal Constitution 13th Schedule requires public display and objection period
cards.sub: EC cited 'administrative efficiency' to justify truncated consultation process

cards.big: 12 of 14 redrawn seats shifted to favour incumbent coalition by 3-7% margins
cards.sub: Boundary changes correlate strongly with ruling party electoral advantage

cards.big: EC commissioners are appointed by PM with no parliamentary confirmation required
cards.sub: Institutional independence compromised when appointing authority benefits from decisions

cards.big: Gerrymandering with no public hearing isn't redelineation — it's electoral engineering
Should an independent boundary commission replace the Election Commission for redelineation?
